3. The RajaYogas in the horoscope are only name sake, if the Moon being weak is in the last
Navansa of a Movable Sign, or in the 8th Navansa of a Fixed Sign, or in the first Navansa of a
Common Sign and is without aspect from any other planet.
151

4. Same effects will come to pass, if all malefics occupy Angles identical with debilitation/inimical
Signs, while benefics are shunted to the 12th, 6th and 8th Houses.
5. If the Ascendant is in Vargottama position without aspect to any planet, the Raja Yogas will
only be a failure.
6. Even a hundred kingly Yogas will be of no avail, if Aquarius rises, while 3 heavenly bodies are
in their Signs of fall.
7. If there is no benefic in an Angle, or with the Moon, while 4 planets are either in fall, or in
combustion, or in inimical Signs, the RajaYogas are marred.
8. Should the Sun be in his own Navansa, while the Moon is in combustion and in aspect to
